mentions.note: Income without growth; prefer master limited partnerships like Enterprise Products (EPD) or other MLPs with better growth-plus-income profile.

FCC approved $23B EchoStar spectrum purchase for 5G rural coverage. Cramer: 'I don't want to be in AT&T.' Starlink and Amazon Leo satellite competition will overshadow AT&T's rural broadband advantage.
Facing headwind from Starlink competition; no growth story; recommend selling due to competitive pressures; stock up against Starlink is problematic.
